exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
import tempfile
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as d:
    p = Path(d) / "latin.bin"
    p.write_bytes("café".encode("latin-1"))
    try:
        p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    except UnicodeDecodeError as e:
        print("UnicodeDecodeError", type(e).__name__)
        print(p.read_text(encoding="latin-1"))

exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
import os, tempfile

def write_atomic(path, text):
    path = Path(path)
    fd, tmp = tempfile.mkstemp(dir=str(path.parent), prefix=".tmp_")
    try:
        with os.fdopen(fd, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            f.write(text)
        os.replace(tmp, path)
    except Exception:
        try:
            os.unlink(tmp)
        except OSError:
            pass
        raise

with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as d:
    dest = Path(d) / "out.txt"
    write_atomic(dest, "COMPLETO")
    print(dest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
import os, tempfile
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as d:
    dest = Path(d) / "out.txt"
    dest.write_text("PARCIAL", encoding="utf-8")
    print("mid-write", dest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    tmp = Path(d) / "out.tmp"
    tmp.write_text("COMPLETO", encoding="utf-8")
    os.replace(tmp, dest)
    print("post-atomic", dest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
import csv, tempfile
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as d:
    clean = Path(d) / "clean.csv"
    quar = Path(d) / "quarantine.csv"
    with clean.open("w", encoding="utf-8", newline="") as f:
        w = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=["id", "nombre"])
        w.writeheader()
        w.writerow({"id": "C1", "nombre": "Ana"})
    with quar.open("w", encoding="utf-8", newline="") as f:
        w = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=["row", "reason"])
        w.writeheader()
        w.writerow({"row": "C2,extra", "reason": "col_count"})
    print(clean.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    print(quar.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib, tempfile
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as d:
    p = Path(d) / "f.txt"
    data = b"hola"
    p.write_bytes(data)
    h = hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()
    print(h)
    print(hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == h)

exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
import shutil, tempfile
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as d:
    src = Path(d) / "raw.csv"
    archive = Path(d) / "archive"
    archive.mkdir()
    src.write_text("id\n1\n", encoding="utf-8")
    dest = archive / src.name
    shutil.copy2(src, dest)
    print(dest.exists(), dest.read_text(encoding="utf-8").strip())

exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib, tempfile
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as d:
    p = Path(d) / "x.bin"
    p.write_bytes(b"abc")
    h1 = hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest()
    p.write_bytes(b"abd")
    h2 = hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest()
    print("changed", h1 != h2)
